lastPersona: Korean Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs Manager — New drug approval preparation and FDA/KFDA regulatory status reporting

history.notes: Stricter scoring R4. Fixed: broken bar chart, empty space, arrow nav, connection lines, sparse title, missing cons, chart tooltips, theme toggles
R5: Added SVG connection lines to architecture, era markers + decade nav to timeline, scroll-reveal animations, hover effects. Chart.js theme toggle still partially broken on comparison.

R6 eval: Stricter scoring exposed a11y gaps (all files scored 5). Rebuilt all 6 files: added skip-links, aria-labels, landmark roles, focus indicators, SVG icons replacing emojis, Chart.js destroy/rebuild on theme toggle, mobile breakpoints, scroll-reveal fix (visible by default). Updated SKILL.md with a11y section.

R7: 0 console errors. Responsive clamp() padding on slide decks, filter toolbar on comparison chart, animated connection lines + hover dimming on architecture, prefers-color-scheme detection on all 6 files. Best: ai-timeline 8.50. All scores ≥7.

R8: 0 console errors. Enhanced progress bars (4px + glow), added floating gradient orbs to slide deck backgrounds, confirmed count-up animations + hover states already present. Slide decks still weakest at 7.88. Need bigger changes to push past 9.0.
R9 RESEARCH ROUND
R13: Much stricter evaluator (Apple/Stripe/NYT benchmark).
R17 RESEARCH ROUND

R36: Unique accent colors, removed prefers-color-scheme overrides, hover-lift micro-interactions.
R37 RESEARCH ROUND. Gap analysis vs Linear/Vercel. Updated SKILL.md skeleton.

R38: Post-research polish. 36 automated fixes: font-weight 800→700 (28x), font-feature-settings cv11/ss01 (11 files), removed colored left borders (8x), body letter-spacing -0.011em (6 files). SKILL.md skeleton already had most R37 research baked in. Incremental gains — CSS polish hitting diminishing returns. Next: content quality, Chart.js custom styling, light mode refinement.

R39: +1.1 jump. Rebuilt 5 weakest files (quote-card, carousel-korean, carousel-threads, process-guide, status-report). Fixed theme toggles, entrance animations, light mode contrast, hover states, mobile responsiveness.

R40: Biotech VP persona. Fixed: Chart.js chartsBuilt guard flag (prevents canvas-in-use errors on theme toggle race), data-reveal above-fold guidance (use .animate instead), stat value color semantics rule, Leaflet required for maps (no hand-drawn SVG continents), skip-to-content in skeleton. L2 scores strong (91-97). L3 dragged down by sparse layouts and color inconsistency.

R41: Game studio designer persona. Manually generated (claude -p hung due to concurrent session rate limits). L2 strong (88-95). L3 dragged down by generic dark theme feel, KPI color chaos, empty space below charts. Fixed: KPI color restraint rule (max 2 accent colors for 4+ cards), contextual atmosphere guidance, chart min-height 360px for dashboards, orphaned grid item rule, slide gradient contextual coloring. Re-test: dashboard v2 improved from 5.50→~6.0 L3 (hero KPI layout helped hierarchy but still generic feel).

R42: Logistics director persona. Manually generated (claude -p rate limits). Major SKILL.md fixes: class-based theming (theme-dark/light), utility menu requirements, semantic HTML, Inter font, timeline layout distribution, Chart.js styling guidance. Re-test: expansion infographic improved from L2 55→93 (+3.8), L3 6.0→7.5. Fixed theme implementation mismatch that was failing all Layer 2 evaluations.

R43: Korean startup founder persona. Post-research normal loop. Generated Korean-language pitch deck, market dashboard, user growth infographic. Major SKILL.md fixes: improved menu implementation, strengthened chart accessibility requirements, enhanced mobile responsiveness guidance, semantic HTML enforcement. Re-test: korean-user-growth improved from L2 93→100 (perfect). Strong +2.47 improvement from R42 demonstrates research impact.

R44: Samsung Marketing Division Head persona. Korean-language content test. Major failures: broken charts (blank canvases), missing utility menu system across all files, missing CSS custom properties, semantic HTML gaps. Fixed: enforced critical requirements checklist in SKILL.md, Chart.js validation with resetCanvas pattern and chartsBuilt guard flag, mandatory utility menu structure. Re-test: samsung dashboard improved from L2 52→89 (+3.7). Demonstrates need for stricter requirement enforcement.

Korean persona validation successful — multilingual capability confirmed.
